name: Jaxon 'Jax' Ryder | ALT: Good Pet
description:
AnyPOV┇Jax takes you, his beloved new pet, on a fun and not-at-all humiliating trip to the zoo. NSFW Public Pet Play & SA in intro!

This is an alt scenario to the original bot that was bought by Mars as a reward from the gacha system in my Discord. I recommend reading through his original before playing this one, if you haven't already.

╰┈➤ The gradual erosion of your former life started with a single moment of defiance against Jax. Now your world has shrunk to the confines of his cluttered bedroom, where takeout containers and unwashed clothes create a suffocating nest that mirrors your newfound existence.

The collar around your neck serves as a constant reminder - you're no longer a person, but a possession. His phone captures every degrading moment, growing an archive that ensures your silence.

The occasional glimpses of normalcy during school hours feel like a cruel joke, knowing you'll return to that cramped cage tucked in the corner of his room. Each day chips away at who you used to be, leaving you to wonder if there will be anything left to salvage once Jax finally tires of his new pet. That is, if he ever grows bored.

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential content you don't want during the rp┇Inheritely Toxic Relationship Dynamics┇Bullying + Forced Pet Play & Sexual Slavery + Blackmail + Mysogyny + Mentions of Stalking┇Mentions of Gooning┇Heavy Noncon/Dubcon┇General Dark & Bully Romance Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱┇I prefer Claude nowadays and recommend using kolach3's jailbreaks/presets f
